name: @mediation-rooms/contracts
description: Solidity contracts for Mediation Rooms — registry, guard and demo escrow

scripts.build: command -v forge >/dev/null && forge build || echo 'Skipping: install Foundry to compile contracts'
scripts.test: command -v forge >/dev/null && forge test || echo 'Skipping: install Foundry to run contract tests'
scripts.deploy:local: command -v forge >/dev/null && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:DeployScript --rpc-url ${RPC_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:8545} --broadcast --private-key ${PRIVATE_KEY:-0xac0974bec39a17bbad8b97c047d83019108eb9c93935c68d68f22bbee68b9fe} && pnpm export:abis || echo 'Skipping: install Foundry to deploy contracts'
scripts.deploy:braga: command -v forge >/dev/null && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:DeployScript --rpc-url ${RPC_URL:-https://braga.hoodi.arkiv.network/rpc} --broadcast --private-key ${PRIVATE_KEY:?set PRIVATE_KEY} --slow && pnpm export:abis || echo 'Skipping: install Foundry to deploy contracts'
